title: Mavrodi Villagers
description: All villagers are Sergei Mavrodi and they try to sell you their securities
body:
**Sergei Mavrodi** is known as the founder of several financial pyramids. The most famous of them is MMM JSC.

This resource pack turns villagers into Sergei Mavrodi, who are also trying to sell you their shares instead of ordinary emeralds.
